scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd server && PORT=3210 npm run dev" "cd client && VITE_PORT=5210 VITE_API_PORT=3210 npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && PORT=3210 npm run start
scripts.dev:backend: cd server && PORT=3210 npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd client && VITE_PORT=5210 VITE_API_PORT=3210 npm run dev
